nasb.text: That when the wicked sprouted up like grass And all who did iniquity flourished, It was only that they might be destroyed forevermore.

esv.text: that though the wicked sprout like grass and all evildoers flourish, they are doomed to destruction forever;

cnv.text: 惡人雖好像草一樣繁茂， 所有作孽的人雖然興旺， 他們都要永遠滅亡。

ccb.text: 恶人虽如草滋生，一时亨通， 但终必永远灭亡。

csbs.text: 尽管恶人如牧草茂盛， 所有做坏事的人都兴旺， 他们也要被永远除灭。
